overall.description: A static first-person view from a high-rise apartment bedroom in a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis, looking out a panoramic window at the skyline during blue hour. Flying vehicles occasionally pass by the window while neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the distant view. The scene is from Cyberpunk 2077, contrasting the dimly lit interior with the sprawling illuminated city outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

events.description: flying vehicle passes by the window from left to right
second flying vehicle passes by the window moving slowly across the frame

agents.ego_description: lying still in bed, gazing out the window at the cityscape and passing air traffic

notable_agents.action: flying car passing by the window from left to right at approximately 20 seconds

entered.detail: unmade bed with rumpled silver satin sheets in the immediate foreground
dark brick wall with shelving unit to the left of the window
rectangular ceiling light emitting warm artificial illumination
floor-to-ceiling panoramic window framing the city view
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage
distinctive tall cylindrical skyscraper with vertical lighting strips
glowing red and blue neon advertisements on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: A completely static view from a high-rise apartment bedroom during the blue hour, looking out over a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. The foreground features an unmade bed with silver sheets and an exposed brick wall, while the massive window reveals a dense skyline of illuminated towers. Flying vehicles occasionally drift past the window, adding subtle motion to the otherwise tranquil scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a high-rise bedroom that emphasizes the contrast between a quiet interior and a bustling futuristic skyline. It begins with a view of an unmade bed with silver sheets and an exposed brick wall, framing the sprawling cyberpunk metropolis outside. As the gaze lingers on the dense skyline of illuminated towers during the blue hour, the stillness of the room is punctuated by the movement of the city. The scene then settles into a tranquil observation of the horizon, where flying vehicles occasionally drift past the window against the backdrop of the glowing metropolis.
